data.title: Chevron, Exxon Edge Higher As Q1 Earnings Tank, But Outlook Shapes Up
data.description: During the first quarter, there was a significant surge in oil prices; however, two major oil companies, Exxon and Chevron, experienced a notable double-digit decline in earnings. This surprising outcome can be attributed to various factors. Despite this setback, there is a positive outlook for both companies as they navigate through these challenges. Investors observed a slight increase in the stock value of Chevron and Exxon as their Q1 earnings took a hit.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Tyson Foods Stock Ahead Of Q2 Earnings
data.description: Tyson Foods, Inc. is set to report its second-quarter earnings on May 4. Analysts anticipate earnings to be 78 cents per share, a decrease from 92 cents per share last year. Revenue for this quarter is estimated to be around $13.61 billion, up from $13.07 billion in the previous year. Piper Sandler analyst Michael Lavery recently upgraded Tyson Foods' rating to Overweight with a new price target of $75, raised from $61. The company currently offers an annual dividend yield of 3.18%, with a quarterly dividend of 51 cents per share ($2.04 per year). This news has drawn attention from investors looking to benefit from potential gains.

data.title: Dominion Energy Announces First-Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia, Dominion Energy, Inc. (NYSE: D) disclosed its unaudited GAAP net income for the first quarter of 2026 to be $621 million ($0.69 per share), a decrease from the $665 million ($0.77 per share) reported for the same period in 2025. Meanwhile, the operating earnings for the first quarter of 2026 stood at $847 million ($0.95 per share), as opposed to the GAAP net income, representing a notable figure in comparison.

data.title: Abaxx Announces the Formation of Abaxx Labs and the Release of an Open-Source Library for Agentic Identity: Agents++
data.description: Abaxx recently launched Abaxx Labs with the aim of encouraging developers to create more efficient markets using open-source tools that leverage the company's advanced ID++ technology.

data.title: Gildan Activewear Reports on Shareholders’ Voting Results
data.description: In Montreal, on May 1, 2026, Gildan Activewear Inc. (GIL: TSX and NYSE) announced that all nine director nominees from the March 17, 2026 management proxy circular were elected by a majority of votes at the annual shareholder meeting on April 30, 2026. The meeting, held in Montreal, saw shareholders or their proxies vote in favor of reappointing the auditor, ratifying the Shareholder Rights Plan, and supporting the non-binding advisory vote on Executive Compensation ("Say on Pay").

data.title: CoinShares Announces FY2025 Results Reflecting Continued Strong Growth
data.description: On May 1, 2026, CoinShares PLC (Nasdaq: CSHR) announced its financial results for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025. As a prominent global asset manager in digital assets, the company runs an institutional-grade platform with integrated Capital Markets capabilities.

data.title: Keenova Presents a New TERLIVAZ® (terlipressin) Clinical Analysis at Digestive Disease Week
data.description: Keenova Therapeutics plc revealed today the unveiling of a new report concerning hepatorenal syndrome-acute kidney injury (HRS‑AKI) and their drug TERLIVAZ® (terlipressin) at the upcoming Digestive Disease Week (DDW) scheduled from May 2-5, 2026. The company expressed contentment in disclosing this information, emphasizing their commitment to advancing knowledge on the subject.

data.title: Spirit Blockchain Capital Inc. Files 2025 Audited Financial Statements and Provides Corporate Update
data.description: In Vancouver, Canada, on May 01, 2026, Spirit Blockchain Capital Inc. disclosed the filing of its audited financial statements and accompanying management’s discussion and analysis for the fiscal year closing on December 31, 2025. The company is listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange (CSE: SPIR) and trades on the OTC Markets Group Inc.'s OTCQB Venture Market (SBLCF).

data.title: Gates Industrial Reports First-Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In the financial summary for the first quarter of 2026, it was reported that net sales reached $851.1 million, showing a slight increase of 0.4% from the same period last year. However, core revenue experienced a decrease of 2.9%. The net income attributed to shareholders was $59.7 million, translating to earnings of $0.23 per diluted share.

data.title: Federal Realty Investment Trust Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In North Bethesda, Maryland, on May 1, 2026, Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE: FRT) released its first-quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2026. The net income available for common shareholders for the first quarter of 2026 was $1.81 per diluted share. Comparatively, for the same period in 2025, the net income available for common shareholders was also $1.81 per diluted share.

data.title: Cboe Global Markets Reports Results for First Quarter 2026 and Continued Execution of Strategic Realignment
data.description: In the first quarter, there were several noteworthy accomplishments: Diluted EPS reached a record high at $3.66, marking a 54 percent increase, while Adjusted Diluted EPS rose to $3.70, reflecting a 48 percent increase. Net revenue also hit a record high, reaching $728.9 million, a substantial 29 percent increase. Additionally, the 2026 Organic Total Net Revenue Growth Target has been raised to 'low...'.

data.title: Phoenix Financial Joins MSCI World Index
data.description: In Tel-Aviv, Israel, on May 1, 2026, Phoenix Financial, a prominent Israeli company specializing in asset management, insurance, and financial services (TASE: PHOE), revealed its new milestone of being added to the renowned MSCI World index. This index is a widely recognized benchmark utilized by investors globally to track the performance of stocks across various markets. The inclusion in this index signifies a significant achievement for Phoenix Financial, highlighting its growing presence and reputation in the financial sector.

data.title: Soluna Regains Compliance with Nasdaq Listing Requirements
data.description: Albany, New York - Soluna Holdings, Inc., a provider of green data centers for high-computing needs like AI and Bitcoin mining, shared that it has been informed by The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC that it is now in compliance with the minimum bid price requirement under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). After regaining compliance with the rule, the company's shares have maintained a minimum closing price. Soluna is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SLNH.
UKMTO REPORTED THAT THE CAPTAIN OF A BULK CARRIER SAID HE WAS APPROACHED BY A SMALL BOAT WITH A BLACK HULL AND SEVEN ARMED INDIVIDUALS.

data.title: Owens Corning Completes Sale of Glass Reinforcements Business to Praana Group
data.description: In Toledo, Ohio, Owens Corning (NYSE: OC) has finalized the sale of its glass reinforcements division to Praana Group. This move solidifies Owens Corning's position as a primarily building products-focused company in North America and Europe, improving its capital efficiency. The deal, initially revealed on April 15, 2026, has an enterprise value of $645 million. Notably, the agreement includes higher upfront cash earnings, which expedite the cash realization for Owens Corning.

data.title: Natural Grocers® Offers Mile High Giveaway at Select Colorado Front Range Stores, May 1-July 2, 2026
data.description: Natural Grocers®, a Colorado-based company, is providing {N}power® members with the opportunity to win $1,000 of free groceries weekly at over 30 locations in Colorado. This initiative aims to reward customers while promoting the brand's commitment to natural and organic products. Participants can enter for a chance to win at select stores.

data.title: Power Life High Impact Protein is a Must-Have for National Physical Fitness and Sports Month
data.description: A new protein formula, Power Life® High Impact Protein™, has been introduced to support performance, strength, and active lifestyles as part of National Physical Fitness and Sports Month. This all-in-one formula aims to help individuals prioritize strength, movement, and wellness. The product is set to launch in Los Angeles on May 1, 2026, targeting those looking to enhance their fitness regime.
